prompt: Create a cinematic ultra-realistic landscape photograph of a lone hiker standing in an alpine meadow at golden-hour sunset, looking toward dramatic jagged mountain peaks. The scene is in early autumn with warm orange, red, and golden foliage, tall grasses, wildflowers, evergreen trees, and a broad valley filled with thin drifting mist. The sun sits low near the right horizon, partially touching the mountain ridge, casting intense amber light, long shadows, glowing rim light, and soft lens flare across the frame. Include exactly one visible human figure: a small dark silhouette near the lower center, wearing outdoor clothing and standing still with their back to the viewer. The background contains three dominant rocky mountain massifs across the middle of the image, with distant snow-capped peaks faintly visible on the far left horizon. Use a wide 16:9 composition, low meadow foreground with shallow depth of field and blurred red and yellow flowers, crisp midground trees and rock textures, atmospheric haze in the valley, dramatic orange cloud-filled sky, high dynamic range, natural colors, epic travel photography style, no text, no buildings, no roads, no watermark.
